import time
from typing import Any

_cache: dict[str, tuple[Any, float]] = {}


def get_cached_value(key: str) -> Any | None:
    if key in _cache:
        value, ts = _cache[key]
        return value
    return None


def set_cached_value(key: str, value: Any, ttl: float = 300) -> None:
    _cache[key] = (value, time.time())


def invalidate_cache(key: str) -> None:
    if key in _cache:
        del _cache[key]


def get_cache_stats() -> dict:
    return {"size": len(_cache), "keys": list(_cache.keys())}
